name: Create Story Workflow (Zero Ambiguity)
description: Transform epic into crystal-clear user story with zero ambiguity (Bob's way). Every requirement must be testable and unambiguous.

steps.description: Define user story with business value and clear 'why'
steps.exit_criteria: Story follows 'As a... I want... So that...' format with clear business value

steps.description: Define unambiguous acceptance criteria (Bob's zero ambiguity principle)
steps.exit_criteria: All criteria testable with zero ambiguity (no vague terms)

steps.description: Verify all acceptance criteria are testable and automatable
steps.exit_criteria: Test approach defined for all acceptance criteria

steps.description: Add technical notes and implementation guidance
steps.exit_criteria: Implementation approach clear with no technical ambiguities

success_criteria: Implementation-ready story with zero ambiguity and 100% testable acceptance criteria
